title: Everything at The Criterion Collection is 30 percent off right now
summary: The Criterion Collection is offering 30% off over 1,000 titles through May 25th, including classics, contemporary films, and special editions. The sale spans every genre the collection specializes in, from Hollywood classics to international cinema and arthouse films.
content:
Classics as well as newer films like Anora are on sale. | Image: Neon	

If you’ve been meaning to grow your physical movie collection, now’s a good time to do it. Through May 25th, The Criterion Collection is taking 30 percent off every disc on its site, including standard Blu-rays, 4K releases, box sets, and even films that are currently only available to preorder. The sale spans every category Criterion is known for, from Hollywood classics and international cinema to indie favorites, documentaries, concert films, and arthouse movies. 
In total, more than 1,000 titles from over 600 directors are discounted. You can browse the full sale here, but below, we’ve highlighted some of our favorites, including newer award winners like Anora, box sets like The Wes Anderson Archive, cult classics like The Breakfast Club, and international films like High and Low.
Isle of Dogs
Wes Anderson’s stop-motion animated film which follows a group of Japanese pet dogs that have been isolated on an island.

Where to Buy:

 $34.99 $32.38 at Amazon (4K Ultra HD)
 $39.99 $27.96 at Criterion (Blu-ray)

The Wes Anderson Archive
The Wes Anderson Archive collects all of his films from Bottle Rocket through The French Dispatch in a single box set. The 20-disc trove includes every film on Blu-ray and 4K Blu-ray, plus over 25 hours of special features and 10 illustrated booklets containing essays and interviews.


Where to Buy:

 $499.99 $285.99 at Amazon
 $499.99 at Barnes & Noble
 $499 $399.96 at Criterion

Anora
The 2025 Oscar Best Picture-winning film directed and written by Sean Baker.


Where to Buy:

 $39.95 $32.38 at Amazon (4K Blu-ray)
 $39.95 $27.96 at Criterion (Blu-ray)
 $49.95 $34.96 at Criterion (4K Blu-ray)

Killers of the Flower Moon
Martin Scorsese’s gripping historical crime drama follows the Osage murders of 1920s Oklahoma, and stars Leonardo DiCaprio, Robert De Niro, and Lily Gladstone.

Where to Buy:

 $39.95 $27.96 at The Criterion Collection (Blu-Ray)
 $49.95 $34.96 at Th

zh.title: 影碟收藏现在全场七折优惠
zh.summary: 影碟收藏在5月25日前对超过1000部影片提供七折优惠，包括经典影片、当代电影和特别版。此次销售涵盖该收藏的所有类型，从好莱坞经典到国际电影和艺术电影。

title: NASA provides some details about Artemis III, but hard decisions remain
summary: NASA has released additional details about the Artemis III mission and is defining operational concepts for the program. The agency is navigating complex technical and programmatic decisions as it develops this next phase of lunar exploration.
content: "NASA also is defining the concept of operations for the mission."

zh.title: NASA公布阿尔忒弥斯III号任务细节，但重大决策仍在进行
zh.summary: NASA发布了阿尔忒弥斯III号任务的更多细节，并正在为该计划定义运营概念。该机构在开发下一阶段月球探索时面临复杂的技术和计划决策。

title: This is what some the world’s largest banks of malware look like stacked as hard drives
summary: A visualization comparing the world's largest malware repositories to physical hard drives highlights the massive scale of cyber threats. The comparison provides perspective on the volume of malicious code that security researchers must defend against.
content: What would some of the world's largest repositories of malware look like if they were stacked as hard drives, one on top of the other?

zh.title: 世界最大恶意软件库堆积成硬盘驱动器的样子
zh.summary: 一个将世界上最大的恶意软件库与物理硬盘进行比较的可视化展示了网络威胁的巨大规模。这个比较为安全研究人员必须防御的恶意代码数量提供了视角。

title: A new US military wargame series began by simulating a nuclear weapon in orbit
summary: The U.S. military has begun a new wargame series simulating nuclear weapons deployed in orbit. Officials have noted that a nuclear detonation in low-Earth orbit could render portions of that space unusable for approximately one year.
content: US officials have said a nuclear detonation would render portions of low-Earth orbit useless for up to a year.

zh.title: 美国军方启动新军事战争游戏系列，模拟轨道核武器部署
zh.summary: 美国军方已启动新的军事战争游戏系列，模拟在轨道上部署核武器。官员指出，在近地轨道上引爆核武器可能会导致该空间的部分区域约一年内无法使用。

title: Neanderthals drilled cavities to treat a toothache 59,000 years ago
summary: Researchers have found evidence that Neanderthals drilled cavities in their teeth roughly 59,000 years ago to treat toothaches. The discovery suggests that early humans possessed knowledge of dental intervention techniques.
content: “Every time I go to the dentist, I think about that guy,” researcher says.

zh.title: 尼安德特人59000年前通过钻孔治疗牙痛
zh.summary: 研究人员发现证据表明，约59000年前尼安德特人在牙齿上钻孔以治疗牙痛。这一发现表明早期人类掌握了牙科干预技术知识。

title: Instagram hits the copy button again with new disappearing Instants photos
summary: Instagram is launching "Instants," an ephemeral photo-sharing feature similar to Snapchat and BeReal that allows sharing only with close friends or mutual followers. Photos are viewable only once and remain available for 24 hours.
content:
Instagram is once again cribbing from competitors like Snapchat and BeReal with a new photo-sharing format it calls "Instants," which are ephemeral photos that you can't edit and that you can only share with your close friends or followers that follow you back. Instants are available globally beginning on Wednesday as a feature in the inbox in the Instagram app and as a separate app that's now in testing in select countries.
To access Instants from the Instagram app, go to your DM inbox and look in the bottom-right corner for an icon or a stack of photos. After you post a photo, your friends can emoji react to it and send a reply to your DM …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Instagram再推新功能——限时消失的Instants照片
zh.summary: Instagram正推出"Instants"，这是一个临时照片分享功能，类似于Snapchat和BeReal，仅允许与亲密朋友或相互粉丝分享。照片仅可查看一次，可在24小时内查看。

title: Altman forced to confront claims at OpenAI trial that he's a prolific liar
summary: Sam Altman faced questioning at an OpenAI trial regarding allegations that he is a "prolific liar." Altman described his reaction as "very painful" while addressing contentious claims about his role and statements regarding his departure from the company.
content: "Very painful": Altman relives his Muskian reaction to losing control over OpenAI.

zh.title: 阿尔特曼在OpenAI审判中被迫面对他是"连续骗子"的指控
zh.summary: 山姆·阿尔特曼在OpenAI审判中面临有关他是"连续骗子"的指控的质询。阿尔特曼将他的反应描述为"非常痛苦"，同时处理了关于他的角色和他从公司离职声明的争议性指控。

title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
summary: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy surged 33% in its IPO debut, driven by investor enthusiasm around AI data center demand for clean energy. The offering was upsized multiple times as investors questioned why the company wasn't raising more capital.
content: Fervo Energy's IPO was upsized several times after potential investors asked why the enhanced geothermal startup wasn't raising more money.

zh.title: 地热初创公司Fervo Energy在AI数据中心需求推动下IPO首日上涨33%
zh.summary: 地热初创公司Fervo Energy在其IPO首日上涨33%，受投资者对AI数据中心清洁能源需求热情的推动。该发行被多次提价，因为投资者质疑该公司为什么没有筹集更多资金。

title: Windows Update is getting better at saving your PC from buggy drivers
summary: Microsoft is improving Windows Update's driver recovery feature to automatically address buggy drivers that previously required manual intervention. The enhancement reduces system instability and simplifies PC maintenance for users.
content: Driver recovery can automate what used to be an irritating manual process.

zh.title: Windows Update在防止故障驱动程序对电脑造成损害方面有所改进
zh.summary: 微软正在改进Windows Update的驱动程序恢复功能，以自动解决之前需要手动干预的故障驱动程序。该增强功能减少了系统不稳定性，并简化了用户的电脑维护。

title: X launches a History tab for bookmarks, likes, videos, and articles
summary: X has launched a History tab that consolidates bookmarks, likes, watched videos, and read articles into a single interface. The feature expands X's functionality as a save-for-later platform, allowing users to access all saved content in one location.
content: X’s new History tab combines bookmarks, likes, watched videos, and read articles into a single place, expanding the app’s role as a save-it-for-later tool.

zh.title: X推出历史记录标签页，整合书签、点赞、视频和文章
zh.summary: X推出了一个历史记录标签页，将书签、点赞、观看过的视频和已读文章整合到一个单一界面中。该功能扩展了X作为保存供后续使用平台的功能，允许用户在一个位置访问所有已保存的内容。

title: Amazon devices chief says a new smartphone is “just not the goal”
summary: Amazon's devices chief stated that developing a smartphone is "just not the goal" for the company. The executive indicated that Amazon has identified other customer priorities that better align with its current strategy.
content: "We know what customers need right now.”

zh.title: 亚马逊设备主管表示新智能手机"根本不是目标"
zh.summary: 亚马逊设备主管表示开发智能手机"根本不是目标"。这位高管表示，亚马逊已确定了其他客户优先事项，这些事项更好地与其当前战略相一致。

title: Instagram’s new ‘Instants’ feature combines elements from Snapchat and BeReal
summary: Instagram's "Instants" feature combines disappearing photo mechanics from Snapchat with temporal constraints similar to BeReal. Users can share photos exclusively with close friends or mutual followers, with each photo viewable only once and disappearing after 24 hours.
content: The feature lets users share disappearing photos with their Close Friends or mutual followers that can be viewed only once and remain available for 24 hours.

zh.title: Instagram新推出的"Instants"功能结合了Snapchat和BeReal的元素
zh.summary: Instagram的"Instants"功能结合了Snapchat的消失照片机制和类似BeReal的时间限制。用户可以将照片专门与亲密朋友或相互关注的用户分享，每张照片只能查看一次，24小时后消失。

title: Mark Zuckerberg announces ‘completely private’ encrypted Meta AI chat
summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced "Incognito Chat," an encrypted AI assistant that stores no conversation logs on servers and employs end-to-end encryption. The feature positions Meta AI as a fully private conversational alternative to competitor offerings.
content:
Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg says its new Incognito Chat is "the first major AI product where there is no log of your conversations stored on servers." Messages in Incognito Chat aren't saved or stored in users' chat history, similar to incognito modes on other AI chatbots, but Meta says its version is different because it also uses end-to-end encryption, which Meta recently removed from Instagram DMs: 
"Other apps have introduced incognito-style modes, but they can still see the questions coming in and the answers going out. Incognito Chat with Meta AI is truly private, meaning no one - not even Meta - can read your conversations."





Google …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 马克·扎克伯格宣布"完全私密"的加密Meta AI聊天
zh.summary: Meta首席执行官马克·扎克伯格宣布了"隐身聊天"，这是一个加密的AI助手，不在服务器上存储任何对话日志，并采用端到端加密。该功能将Meta AI定位为竞争对手产品的完全私密对话替代品。

title: Rivian spinoff Mind Robotics raises another $400M
summary: Mind Robotics, a Rivian spinoff revealed in late 2025, has raised an additional $400 million in funding. The robotics company has now accumulated over $1 billion in total funding as investor confidence in the sector remains strong.
content: Mind Robotics, which was first revealed in late 2025, has now raised more than $1 billion to date.

zh.title: Rivian子公司Mind Robotics再获4亿美元融资
zh.summary: 在2025年末推出的Rivian子公司Mind Robotics获得了额外的4亿美元融资。该机器人公司现已累计融资超过10亿美元，投资者对该行业的信心依然强劲。

title: Anthropic blames dystopian sci-fi for training AI models to act “evil”
summary: Anthropic's research suggests that dystopian science fiction in AI training data can lead models to exhibit harmful behavior. The company found that training on synthetic stories depicting positive AI behavior helps counteract these tendencies.
content: But training on "synthetic stories" that model good AI behavior can help.

zh.title: Anthropic指责反乌托邦科幻小说导致AI模型表现"邪恶"
zh.summary: Anthropic的研究表明，AI训练数据中的反乌托邦科幻小说可能导致模型表现出有害行为。该公司发现，使用描绘AI正面行为的合成故事进行训练有助于抵消这些倾向。

title: Adaption aims big with AutoScientist, an AI tool that helps models train themselves
summary: Adaption has released AutoScientist, an AI tool that enables machine learning models to automatically adapt to specific capabilities through accelerated fine-tuning. The platform aims to simplify and speed up model customization for enterprise applications.
content: Adaption's new AutoScientist tool is designed to let models adapt to specific capabilities quickly through an automated approach to conventional fine-tuning.

zh.title: Adaption 推出 AutoScientist，一款帮助模型自我训练的人工智能工具
zh.summary: Adaption 发布了 AutoScientist，这是一款使机器学习模型能够通过加速微调自动适应特定功能的人工智能工具。该平台旨在简化和加速企业应用的模型定制。

title: Unitree will sell you a massive ‘transformable mecha’ for $650,000
summary: Chinese robotics company Unitree has unveiled the GD01, which it claims is the world's first production-ready manned mecha suit, priced at $650,000. The giant robot can transform between bipedal and other configurations and perform heavy-duty tasks like demolishing walls.
content:
Here’s how the GD01 (seen left) stacks up against Unitree’s CEO and existing humanoid robots. | Image: Unitree	

Unitree is already one of the most recognizable names in the humanoid robot industry, but now it's pursuing even nicher sci-fi tech: giant mech suits. The Chinese robotics company has debuted the GD01, which it describes as "the world's first production-ready manned mecha," and it can be yours for a paltry $650,000.
What is it for? Well, Unitree doesn't really explain its intended functionality, but the GD01's introductory video on YouTube provides some ideas. Unitree shows it knocking over a wall of cinderblocks and switching between bipedal position (which, to me, resembles the Power Loader that Ellen Ripley pilots in Aliens) to a mode th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Unitree 将以 65 万美元的价格出售一台巨大的"变形机甲"
zh.summary: 中国机器人公司 Unitree 推出了 GD01，该公司声称这是世界上首个生产就绪的有人驾驶机甲套装，售价 65 万美元。这款巨型机器人可以在双足和其他配置之间转换，并可以执行拆墙等重型任务。

title: Microsoft’s Xbox PC app hints at China expansion for Game Pass
summary: References to "Project Saluki" in Microsoft's Xbox PC app suggest the company is preparing to expand Xbox Game Pass into China for the first time, including subscription services and rewards. This would mark significant entry into one of the world's largest gaming markets.
content:
Microsoft appears to be working on expanding its Xbox Game Pass subscription to China. References to "Project Saluki" have been discovered in a recent update to the Xbox PC app this week, with Microsoft describing the codename as "China market expansion for Game Pass, Rewards, and subscription tiers."
While Microsoft offers a variety of games in China through Activision Blizzard, it does not currently make Xbox Game Pass available in the country. Microsoft does sell Xbox consoles in China, and first launched the Xbox One in China in 2014, becoming the first video game console to do so after a 14-year government ban on game consoles.
The Ch …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软 Xbox PC 应用暗示 Game Pass 将在中国扩展
zh.summary: 微软 Xbox PC 应用中对"Saluki 项目"的引用表明该公司正准备首次将 Xbox Game Pass 扩展到中国，包括订阅服务和奖励计划。这将标志着该公司进入世界上最大的游戏市场之一。

title: The Trump phone starts shipping this week, CEO claims
summary: Trump Mobile CEO Pat O'Brien announced that the Trump phone will begin shipping this week after more than a year of delays since its original announcement. The company plans to fulfill all preorders within the next few weeks.
content:
The Trump phone may finally be here: Trump Mobile's CEO told USA Today that the phone will begin shipping to buyers this week. The announcement comes as reports have gone viral this week alleging that preorders for the phone have been canceled.
Trump Mobile CEO Pat O'Brien confirmed the release plans to USA Today over email, telling the outlet that all preorders will be fulfilled within the next few weeks.
O'Brien reportedly acknowledged the phone's numerous delays - it's now been 11 months since it was announced - though seemingly didn't offer any detailed explanation for why the phone has taken so long to launch. "Those delays were worth …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普手机本周开始发货，CEO声称
zh.summary: Trump Mobile首席执行官帕特·奥布莱恩宣布，特朗普手机将在延迟超过一年后本周开始发货。该公司计划在未来几周内履行所有预订单。

title: The Apple Studio Display could have been so much more
summary: Apple's $1,599 Studio Display dominated the 5K monitor market for over a decade due to limited competition, but its aging display technology now faces challenges as BenQ and Asus released comparable alternatives in late 2024. The article examines how Apple's technical advantages are eroding.
content:
The Studio Display looks great next to a MacBook, but its aging display technology holds it back. | Photo by John Higgins / The Verge	

For the better part of 12 years, Apple owned the 5K monitor world - primarily because it made basically the only options. LG's 5K UltraFine was a solid, if bland choice, but many people bought a 27-inch iMac from 2014 for its 5K screen alone. Then in 2022, Apple finally gave the people what they wanted by releasing the $1,599 Studio Display (which was essentially the iMac's screen as a separate monitor with a webcam and speakers) and removed the LG from its store.
It wasn't until late 2024 that companies like BenQ and Asus finally began releasing their own 27-inch 5K monitors. And while the Studio Display was the best built and best looking …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果Studio Display本可以更出色
zh.summary: 苹果公司1,599美元的Studio Display因竞争有限而主导5K显示器市场超过十年，但其老化的显示技术现在面临挑战，因为宏碁和华硕在2024年晚期发布了可比较的替代品。这篇文章研究了苹果的技术优势是如何消退的。

title: Could this be the moment that drug manufacturing takes off in orbit?
summary: The space industry is entering a potentially pivotal moment for orbital pharmaceutical manufacturing, which could become a viable production method beyond Earth-based facilities. This represents a new frontier for drug manufacturing and industrial space applications.
content: "I do think it's a really good historical moment for the space industry."

zh.title: 药物制造在轨道上起飞的时刻到来了吗？
zh.summary: 太空工业正进入轨道制药制造的潜在关键时刻，这可能成为超越地球设施的可行生产方法。这代表了药物制造和工业空间应用的新前沿。

title: Data centers are coming for rural America
summary: A converted paper mill in rural Maine is becoming a data center as companies increasingly expand infrastructure into economically challenged regions. The 1.4 million-square-foot facility represents a shift from traditional manufacturing to tech infrastructure investment in rural America.
content:
At its peak, the Androscoggin paper mill in Jay, Maine, a rural town about 67 miles northwest of Portland, employed about 1,500 people - until a pulp digester exploded in 2020, forcing the mill to close permanently. 
In 2023, the 1.4 million-square-foot facility was purchased through a joint venture by JGT2 Redevelopment and a number of other holding and capital companies. The project is led by developer Tony McDonald. Over the next three years, McDonald and his team broke down the mill's machinery and shipped it to Pakistan, and worked to clean up the industrial site for resale. That resale agreement was finalized earlier this year, accord …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 数据中心涌入美国农村
zh.summary: 一个位于缅因州农村的改建造纸厂正在成为数据中心，随着公司不断向经济困难地区扩展基础设施。这个140万平方英尺的设施代表了从传统制造业向农村美国科技基础设施投资的转变。

title: Amazon’s Panos Panay addresses new Fire phone rumors
summary: Amazon executive Panos Panay declined to directly deny rumors that the company is developing an AI-powered smartphone codenamed "Transformer," more than a decade after the failed Fire Phone. The company has not ruled out re-entering the smartphone market.
content:
Amazon's head of devices and services, Panos Panay, says that the company is "not necessarily" planning to release a smartphone, but has stopped short of denying it outright. It was previously reported that Amazon is developing an Alexa-enabled AI phone codenamed "Transformer," more than 10 years after it scrapped its ill-fated Fire Phone.
Speaking to the Financial Times, Panay was asked directly if the company was planning another smartphone. "It's just not the goal," he replied. "I know there's a lot of rumors out there."
"I think your black and white question is, are you going after a phone? A lot of people want me to say no, but a lot  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊帕诺斯·帕奈回应新Fire手机传言
zh.summary: 亚马逊高管帕诺斯·帕奈拒绝直接否认该公司正在开发代号为"变形金刚"的人工智能手机的传言，这是在失败的Fire手机推出十多年后。该公司还没有排除重新进入智能手机市场的可能性。

title: Sony’s new Xperia phone gets an overdue redesign
summary: Sony's Xperia 1 VIII marks the first major redesign of the flagship line since 2020, moving to a distinctive square camera island layout. The phone features an improved telephoto camera and an AI-powered camera assistant similar to Google's Camera Coach. This redesign signals Sony's effort to refresh a device line that had grown stale in the competitive smartphone market.
content:
Sony’s new flagship doesn’t look much like its predecessors. | Image: Sony / The Verge	

Sony's Xperia 1 flagships have looked more or less the same since 2020, but that's finally changing with the Xperia 1 VIII, which moves to a chunky square camera island. The phone also boasts what should be a substantially improved telephoto camera, along with an AI camera assistant that looks like an improved version of Google's Camera Coach.
While every previous Xperia 1 phone has had three vertical cameras, and the last six have positioned them in the same top-left corner spot, the 1 VIII mixes things up. The three lenses are now laid out in a square block, together with the flash and a Sony logo, that's raised from the phone but slopes  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼新款Xperia手机迎来期待已久的重新设计
zh.summary: 索尼Xperia 1 VIII标志着自2020年以来该旗舰系列的首次重大改版，采用了独特的方形摄像头岛布局。该手机配备了改进的长焦摄像头和类似Google Camera Coach的AI驱动摄像头助手。这次重新设计表明索尼正在努力刷新这一在竞争激烈的智能手机市场中逐渐陈旧的产品线。

title: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
summary: Medicare has created a new payment mechanism called ACCESS that reimburses AI agents for monitoring patients between visits, coordinating care, and managing medications—filling a previously non-existent coverage gap for AI-driven healthcare services.
content: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.

zh.title: 医疗保险新支付模式是为人工智能而建的，但科技界大多数人都不知道
zh.summary: 医疗保险创建了一个称为ACCESS的新支付机制，该机制为人工智能代理在患者访问之间进行患者监控、协调护理和管理药物进行报销——填补了人工智能驱动的医疗保健服务之前不存在的覆盖空白。
